response.overview: This new documentary traces the explosion of punk on London’s Kings Road and is the most authentic insider account of punk’s evolution and legacy, by the artists and people who lived it. Fifty years on, punk’s core values of individuality, creativity, authenticity and freedom, are more relevant than ever. Punk was never about the music - it is a way of life. Features interviews and footage with Hugh Cornwell, Dave Vanian, Vivienne Westwood, Rat Scabies, Gaye Advert, Richard Jobson, Glen Mattlock, Jan Wobble, Terry Chimes, Tony James, Viv Albertine and many more.
response.title: 50 Years of Punk
